notes: Mirror deploy dry-run returns the exact Pandora deployment payload and required validation ticket.
Mirror deploy never auto-copies Polymarket URLs into sources; pass independent public resolution URLs with --sources.
Run agent.market.validate on that final payload before rerunning mirror.deploy with execute mode, then pass --validation-ticket locally or agentPreflight in MCP.

mirror.drift.summary: Read the dedicated live drift/readiness surface for a mirror pair via persisted state or selector-first lookup.

notes: Mirror go inherits the exact market payload from its deploy stage; use the returned validation ticket from paper/dry-run output.
When mirror go will execute a fresh deploy, provide independent public --sources and a matching validation ticket.
Run agent.market.validate on that exact payload before rerunning mirror.go with execute or execute-live.
Private-routing flags affect only the Ethereum Pandora rebalance leg. They do not make the Polygon hedge leg atomic.

mirror.go.canonicalUsage: pandora [--output table|json] mirror go --polymarket-market-id <id>|--polymarket-slug <slug> [--liquidity-usdc <n>] [--fee-tier <500-50000>] [--max-imbalance <n>] [--arbiter <address>] [--category <id|name>] [--paper|--dry-run|--execute-live|--execute] [--auto-sync] [--sync-once] [--auto-resolve] [--auto-close] [--resolve-answer yes|no] [--resolve-reason <text>] [--resolve-watch-interval-ms <ms>] [--resolve-watch-timeout-ms <ms>] [--sync-interval-ms <ms>] [--drift-trigger-bps <n>] [--hedge-trigger-usdc <n>] [--hedge-ratio <n>] [--no-hedge] [--rebalance-mode atomic|incremental] [--price-source on-chain|indexer] [--rebalance-route public|auto|flashbots-private|flashbots-bundle] [--rebalance-route-fallback fail|public] [--flashbots-relay-url <url>] [--flashbots-auth-key <key>] [--flashbots-target-block-offset <n>] [--max-rebalance-usdc <n>] [--max-hedge-usdc <n>] [--max-open-exposure-usdc <amount>] [--max-trades-per-day <n>] [--cooldown-ms <ms>] [--depth-slippage-bps <n>] [--min-time-to-close-sec <n>] [--strict-close-time-delta] [--chain-id <id>] [--rpc-url <url>] [--polymarket-rpc-url <url>] [--private-key <hex>|--profile-id <id>|--profile-file <path>] [--funder <address>] [--usdc <address>] [--oracle <address>] [--factory <address>] [--distribution-yes <parts>] [--distribution-no <parts>] [--distribution-yes-pct <pct>] [--distribution-no-pct <pct>] [--sources <url...>] [--validation-ticket <ticket>] [--target-timestamp <unix|iso>] [--manifest-file <path>] [--trust-deploy] [--skip-gate] [--polymarket-host <url>] [--polymarket-gamma-url <url>] [--polymarket-gamma-mock-url <url>] [--polymarket-mock-url <url>] [--with-rules] [--include-similarity] [--min-close-lead-seconds <n>] [--dotenv-path <path>]

agentPreflight.description: Agent validation attestation for execute or execute-live mode.

autocompleteTicket.description: Optional ticket from agent.market.autocomplete when the agent drafted the market.

validationDecision.description: Validation verdict from the agent AI run.

validationSummary.description: Short summary of the validation result.

validationTicket.description: Ticket returned by agent.market.validate for the exact market payload.

auto-close.description: After auto-resolve completes, run mirror close automatically. Polymarket settlement still remains manual.

auto-resolve.description: After deploy/verify and any finite sync step, watch until resolution is executable and submit resolve automatically. Requires live mode plus explicit resolve inputs.

anyOf.description: Case-insensitive category name accepted by the CLI.

category.description: Category id or canonical category name.

execute.description: Execute live/write path.

fee-tier.description: Fee tier in hundredths of a bip.

flashbots-auth-key.description: Optional Flashbots auth key or signer reference for the Ethereum Pandora rebalance leg.

flashbots-relay-url.description: Optional Flashbots/private relay URL for the Ethereum Pandora rebalance leg.

flashbots-target-block-offset.description: Optional target block offset for Flashbots/private bundle submission.

execute.description: Set true to permit live/mutating execution when supported by the tool.

min-close-lead-seconds.description: Minimum lead time before targetTimestamp when Pandora trading closes.

polymarket-rpc-url.description: Polygon RPC URL for Polymarket preflight; comma-separated fallbacks are tried in order. This does not override Pandora reserve reads on --rpc-url.

price-source.description: Reserve source for Pandora pricing. on-chain refreshes outcome-token balances before sizing; indexer uses verify payload reserves.

profile-file.description: Path to a signer profile file.

rebalance-mode.description: Rebalance sizing mode. atomic targets the source price in one Pandora leg when reserves are available; incremental sizes by observed drift.

rebalance-route.description: Pandora-leg execution route. public preserves ordinary mempool submission; auto chooses a private route when supported; flashbots-private requests single-tx private relay submission; flashbots-bundle requests Flashbots bundle semantics for approval+trade paths. This affects only the Ethereum Pandora leg.

rebalance-route-fallback.description: Fallback policy when the requested Pandora-leg private route is unsupported or rejected. fail stops the run; public degrades to ordinary public submission. This does not change Polygon hedge semantics.

resolve-answer.description: Explicit resolution answer used by lifecycle automation.

resolve-reason.description: Operator reason recorded in the lifecycle resolve payload.

resolve-watch-interval-ms.description: Polling interval used by mirror go lifecycle resolve watch.

resolve-watch-timeout-ms.description: Timeout used by mirror go lifecycle resolve watch.

skip-gate.description: Skip all mirror sync gates (boolean) or provide a comma-delimited named skip list.

strict-close-time-delta.description: Promote close-time delta mismatches from diagnostic to blocking.

sync-once.description: Run one sync tick after deploy.

anyOf.description: Explicit target timestamp in unix seconds.
Explicit ISO date/time override for target timestamp.

validation-ticket.description: Ticket returned by agent.market.validate for the exact final payload (CLI execute mode).

with-rules.description: Include rule payloads and copy diagnostics.

mirror.go.summary: Run mirror deploy, verify, and optional sync workflow. Rebalance-route flags apply only to the Ethereum Pandora leg; any sync leg still remains separate Pandora rebalance and Polymarket hedge legs, not atomic.
mirror.go.usage: pandora [--output table|json] mirror go --polymarket-market-id <id>|--polymarket-slug <slug> [--liquidity-usdc <n>] [--fee-tier <500-50000>] [--max-imbalance <n>] [--arbiter <address>] [--category <id|name>] [--paper|--dry-run|--execute-live|--execute] [--auto-sync] [--sync-once] [--auto-resolve] [--auto-close] [--resolve-answer yes|no] [--resolve-reason <text>] [--resolve-watch-interval-ms <ms>] [--resolve-watch-timeout-ms <ms>] [--sync-interval-ms <ms>] [--drift-trigger-bps <n>] [--hedge-trigger-usdc <n>] [--hedge-ratio <n>] [--no-hedge] [--rebalance-mode atomic|incremental] [--price-source on-chain|indexer] [--rebalance-route public|auto|flashbots-private|flashbots-bundle] [--rebalance-route-fallback fail|public] [--flashbots-relay-url <url>] [--flashbots-auth-key <key>] [--flashbots-target-block-offset <n>] [--max-rebalance-usdc <n>] [--max-hedge-usdc <n>] [--max-open-exposure-usdc <amount>] [--max-trades-per-day <n>] [--cooldown-ms <ms>] [--depth-slippage-bps <n>] [--min-time-to-close-sec <n>] [--strict-close-time-delta] [--chain-id <id>] [--rpc-url <url>] [--polymarket-rpc-url <url>] [--private-key <hex>|--profile-id <id>|--profile-file <path>] [--funder <address>] [--usdc <address>] [--oracle <address>] [--factory <address>] [--distribution-yes <parts>] [--distribution-no <parts>] [--distribution-yes-pct <pct>] [--distribution-no-pct <pct>] [--sources <url...>] [--validation-ticket <ticket>] [--target-timestamp <unix|iso>] [--manifest-file <path>] [--trust-deploy] [--skip-gate] [--polymarket-host <url>] [--polymarket-gamma-url <url>] [--polymarket-gamma-mock-url <url>] [--polymarket-mock-url <url>] [--with-rules] [--include-similarity] [--min-close-lead-seconds <n>] [--dotenv-path <path>]

execute.description: Execute live/write path.

flashbots-auth-key.description: Optional Flashbots auth key or signer reference for the Ethereum Pandora rebalance leg.

flashbots-target-block-offset.description: Optional target block offset for Flashbots/private bundle submission.

execute.description: Set true to permit live/mutating execution when supported by the tool.

polymarket-rpc-url.description: Polygon RPC URL for Polymarket preflight; comma-separated fallbacks are tried in order. This does not override Pandora reserve reads on --rpc-url.

price-source.description: Reserve source for Pandora pricing. on-chain refreshes outcome-token balances before sizing; indexer uses verify payload reserves.

profile-file.description: Path to a signer profile file.

rebalance-mode.description: Rebalance sizing mode. atomic targets the source price in one Pandora leg when reserves are available; incremental sizes by observed drift.

rebalance-route.description: Pandora-leg execution route. public preserves ordinary mempool submission; auto chooses a private route when supported; flashbots-private requests single-tx private relay submission; flashbots-bundle requests Flashbots bundle semantics for approval+trade paths. This affects only the Ethereum Pandora leg.

rebalance-route-fallback.description: Fallback policy when the requested Pandora-leg private route is unsupported or rejected. fail stops the run; public degrades to ordinary public submission. This does not change Polygon hedge semantics.

skip-gate.description: Skip all mirror sync gates (boolean) or provide a comma-delimited named skip list.

strict-close-time-delta.description: Promote close-time delta mismatches from diagnostic to blocking.

sports.usage: pandora [--output table|json] sports schedule|scores|books list|events list|events live|odds snapshot|odds bulk|consensus|create plan|create run|sync once|run|start|stop|status|resolve plan ...

sports.books.list.canonicalUsage: pandora [--output table|json] sports books list [--provider primary|backup|auto] [--book-priority <csv>] [--timeout-ms <ms>]
sports.books.list.summary: List sportsbook provider health and configured book priorities.
sports.books.list.usage: pandora [--output table|json] sports books list [--provider primary|backup|auto] [--book-priority <csv>] [--timeout-ms <ms>]

sports.create.plan.canonicalUsage: pandora [--output table|json] sports create plan --event-id <id> [--market-type amm|parimutuel] [--selection home|away|draw] [--creation-window-open-min <n>] [--creation-window-close-min <n>] [--category <id|name>] [--book-priority <csv>] [--model-file <path>|--model-stdin]

anyOf.description: Case-insensitive category name accepted by the CLI.

category.description: Category id or canonical category name.

creation-window-close-min.description: Creation window close minutes before kickoff.

creation-window-open-min.description: Creation window open minutes before kickoff.

model-stdin.description: Read BYOM probability JSON from stdin.

sports.create.plan.summary: Build conservative market creation plan from sportsbook consensus.
sports.create.plan.usage: pandora [--output table|json] sports create plan --event-id <id> [--market-type amm|parimutuel] [--selection home|away|draw] [--creation-window-open-min <n>] [--creation-window-close-min <n>] [--category <id|name>] [--book-priority <csv>] [--model-file <path>|--model-stdin]

notes: Use agent.market.autocomplete when the agent must rewrite the question, rules, or timing before market creation.
Run agent.market.validate on the exact final sports market payload before any execute path.

sports.create.run.canonicalUsage: pandora [--output table|json] sports create run --event-id <id> [--market-type amm|parimutuel] [--category <id|name>] [--dry-run|--execute] [--liquidity-usdc <n>] [--chain-id <id>] [--rpc-url <url>] [--private-key <hex>|--profile-id <id>|--profile-file <path>]

agentPreflight.description: Agent validation attestation for execute mode.

autocompleteTicket.description: Optional ticket from agent.market.autocomplete when the agent drafted the market.

validationDecision.description: Validation verdict from the agent AI run.

validationSummary.description: Short summary of the validation result.

validationTicket.description: Ticket returned by agent.market.validate for the exact market payload.

category.description: Category id or canonical category name.

execute.description: Execute live creation.

profile-file.description: Path to a signer profile file.
